title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Spring Form Cake Tin, 12 x 5 cm Round Cake pan with Loose Base for Easy Release, handwash, Fridge and Freezer Safe., Grey
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean handwash recommended, round cake tin is perfect for mini sponges, cakes, cheesecakes and pies. Can be used for individual portions or desserts

EASY RELEASE WITH REMOVABLE BASE: With the safe springform mechanism moving, storing and baking cakes couldn't be any easier. The spring loaded latch and removable loose base quickly and easily releases the cake
FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: Easy to clean, handwash safe. This essential cake pan can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer
NON-STICK: Remove baked cakes with ease with this quality non stick coating. Releases cakes and bakes time and time again. The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: The cake pan is made from carbon steel with steel clip. It is handwash, fridge and freezer safe
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home. Bakeware Icing and Baking Food Prep Tools and Gadgets Cooking and BBQ Household Essentials Next page

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Dishwasher safe and wipe clean with a damp cloth
